releaseNotes: v0.40.1 — DSCSA receiving hardening (patch), from a three-reviewer adversarial security + data-integrity audit. Security: CSV formula-injection neutralized across every export (a lot/serial/drug-name/note starting with =, +, -, or @ can no longer run as a formula when you open an exported CSV in Excel); drug-name and EPCIS lot values are now screened for patient text; error messages no longer echo raw internal details. Data integrity: an accepted unexpected bottle is attributed to its shipment so a later shipment can't re-match it; finalizing a receive is now atomic and one-shot; the durable receiving record keeps both the expected and the scanned quantity. Plus EPCIS/manifest correctness hardening. Schema v26 (additive). The auto-updater rolls 0.40.0 -> 0.40.1 on next launch; your data is unchanged. 998 tests passing; independently verified.
